failedAssertions.reason: Bug in mcp-server.ts list_available_metrics: code reads `data.metrics` but API returns data under `data.types` key. Always shows 'No metrics found' despite API having 11+ metric types. Fix: change `.metrics` to `.types` in the response parsing code.

Bug in mcp-server.ts create_share: tool sends {metrics, start_date, end_date} but API expects {allowed_metrics, data_start, data_end}. Returns 400 validation error. Fix: update client.post() call to use correct field names.

Partial fail: set_metric_preference and delete_metric_preference work correctly. list_metric_preferences fails because code does `Array.isArray(data) ? data : []` but API returns `{preferences:[...]}` wrapped object. Fix: extract `data.preferences` array before rendering.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: MCP section with protocol details, message format examples, test account/key table, and isolation rules for MCP testing
